Class ParametricSortInstance

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.sort.AbstractSort
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort.ParametricSortInstance
All Implemented Interfaces:
HasOrigin, Named, Sort
public final class ParametricSortInstance extends AbstractSort
Concrete sort of a parametric sort.

  • Method Details

    • get

      public static ParametricSortInstance get(ParametricSortDecl base, ImmutableList<GenericArgument> args, Services services)
      Returns the sort of decl instantiated with the arguments arg. If necessary, a new object is created.

    • extendsSorts

      public @NonNull ImmutableSet<Sort> extendsSorts()
      Returns:
      the direct supersorts of this sort. Not supported by NullSort.

    • extendsTrans

      public boolean extendsTrans(@NonNull Sort sort)
      Parameters:
      sort - some sort.
      Returns:
      whether the given sort is a reflexive, transitive subsort of this sort.

    • instantiate

      public static Sort instantiate(GenericSort genericSort, Sort instantiation, Sort toInstantiate, Services services)

      public static Sort instantiate(Sort sort, Map<GenericSort, GenericArgument> map, Services services)
      Instantiate a sort that may be or contain generic sorts with map.

      public boolean isComplete(SVInstantiations instMap)
      Whether this sort is complete when instantiated with instMap.

    • resolveSort

      public Sort resolveSort(SVInstantiations instMap, Services services)
      Get the sort if this parametric sort with all generics instantiated with instMap.

    • containsGenericSort

      public boolean containsGenericSort()
      Whether this sort contains generic sorts.
